bug_report.summary: Splash window title/icon incorrect when opening project (title becomes generic and window icon appears missing)
steps_to_reproduce: Create/open a project from Project Manager (e.g., IconRegression_GradientTexture2D_SharedResource).
Select the project and click the "Edit" button to open it.
Observe the splash/loading window title bar while the editor is launching.
expected_behaviors: Splash/loading window shows the Godot window icon in the title bar.
Splash/loading window title includes the project name (e.g., "<ProjectName> - Godot Engine"), consistent with prior behavior.
actual_behaviors: Splash/loading window title shows only "Godot" (project name missing).
Splash/loading window icon in the top-left of the title bar appears blank/missing.

bug_report.summary: Scene dock: Sprite2D node row renders differently after triple-clicking node name (left-side highlight/focus area differs)
steps_to_reproduce: Create a new 2D scene with a Sprite2D root.
In the Scene dock, triple-click the Sprite2D node name to select it for renaming/editing.
expected_behaviors: The node row’s selection/edit highlight/focus indicator should render consistently (same padding/indicator) across builds.
actual_behaviors: A small left-side portion of the node row (near the node icon/indent area) renders differently between builds after the triple-click (selection/edit highlight/focus indicator appears shifted/missing/altered in that area).
